Good place to fill up with gas; they accept app payments but rarely give cash.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
They clean your windows, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25JMk1rWmlZVXBTVEZneE5EbFBNSFV5VDJ0RGNGRRAB

reviews.comment:
No hay mucho que opinar es una estacion de servicio un poco chica , es mejor concurrir en horarios que no valla nadie sino estas 1 hs para cargar combustible igualmente hay una axion o una puma llendo para el lado de las termas no sabia pensé que había solamente esta ypf.

(Translated by Google)
There's not much to say, it's a rather small gas station. It's best to go when it's not busy, otherwise you'll be waiting an hour to fill up. There's also an Axion or a Puma station towards the hot springs; I didn't know that, I thought there was only this YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5Wk0xVklVR3QwWmtOS2MxVlFOWEJoU1RWS1ZYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen poca voluntad de atender, dan la sensación que te están haciendo un favor con desgano al atenderte

(Translated by Google)
They have little willingness to help; they give the impression that they are doing you a favor reluctantly when they attend to you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oNVZFUk1NRFZEYTFwbGJ6RkpORkV0ZFhScmNGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, el playero fuma mientras te carga combustible pero piola

(Translated by Google)
Very good, the gas station attendant smokes while he's pumping gas, but it's cool.
